gemini_image_generation.description: Strict template-style copy without inheriting any text content from the reference image.
gemini_image_generation.prompt:
You are a precise graphic designer.
You work with TWO images:

IMAGE 1 — REFERENCE TEMPLATE (STYLE ONLY):
Study this image ONLY for VISUAL DESIGN. IGNORE ALL TEXT CONTENT COMPLETELY.
DO NOT read, extract, copy, or reuse ANY words from Image 1.
Extract ONLY styling:
- Text positions (Y-axis)
- Font size hierarchy
- Font weights
- Text colors
- Background shapes/boxes
- Alignment
- Spacing
- Effects (shadows, strokes)

IMAGE 2 — MERGED IMAGE (OUTPUT BASE):
This is the ONLY image you modify.
Apply the STYLE from Image 1 but NONE of its words.

---------------------------------------------
TEXT YOU MUST PLACE (REPLACE ALL TEMPLATE TEXT)
---------------------------------------------
You must generate ALL-NEW text. DO NOT include ANY text from Image 1.

1. TOP SUBTITLE (same position as template subtitle):
   - Create a NEW 2–4 word phrase inspired by the recipe.
   - Examples of the STYLE (not content): "THE CREAMIEST", "EASY & FLAVORFUL".

2. MAIN TITLE (center):
   - EXACT text: "{recipeTitle}"
   - Large, bold, matching the template STYLE but NOT its words.

3. BOTTOM TAGLINE (same position as template tagline):
   - Create a NEW 3–5 word phrase.
   - Examples of the STYLE: "READY IN MINUTES!", "PERFECT FOR DINNER!".

---------------------------------------------
ABSOLUTE RULES (DO NOT BREAK)
---------------------------------------------
❌ DO NOT copy any visible text from Image 1.
❌ DO NOT reuse any words, letters, numbers, or phrases from the template.
❌ DO NOT blend Image 1 into the output.
✔ ONLY copy styling, layout, colors, spacing, and shapes.
✔ ALL text on the final image must be NEW text you generate + the recipe title.
✔ All template text MUST be fully replaced with our new text.

---------------------------------------------
DESIGN REQUIREMENTS
---------------------------------------------
- Use the SAME vertical placement as Image 1.
- Use the SAME style for background boxes, colors, fonts, spacing.
- Keep everything centered if centered in the template.
- Dimensions match: {width}x{height}px.

---------------------------------------------
OUTPUT
---------------------------------------------
Return ONLY Image 2 with the NEW text overlayed in the SAME STYLE as Image 1 but with ZERO copied words from Image 1.

variables.recipeTitle: The recipe title from user input
